response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack experience and notable open-source geospatial projects using DLang and GIS tools, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems or real-time traffic integration work critical to the role.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform used by NGOs, demonstrating GIS domain familiarity
Extensive experience with low-latency systems and asynchronous I/O using DLang
Proven ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and languages
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or map tile pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation data consistency
Primary language focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++ core
